notableEvents.label: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. grounds into a double play, third baseman David Hamilton to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Luis Rengifo. Davis Schneider to 3rd. Daulton Varsho out at 2nd. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. grounds into a double play, third baseman David Hamilton to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Luis Rengifo. Davis Schneider to 3rd. Daulton Varsho out at 2nd. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Eloy Jiménez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Eloy Jiménez grounds out to pitcher Angel Zerpa. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With David Hamilton batting, Greg Jones picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, shortstop Andrés Giménez.

notableEvents.label: Jake Bauers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Bauers lines out to shortstop Andrés Giménez.
